3117730.name: Little Lights Remains TD
3117730.description:
Do you dare to ignite the last spark of hope in a world consumed by shadows?

In Little Lights Remains, by Another Path Studios, you’ll dive into a unique experience that blends adventure and Tower Defense. Step into the role of the Guardian of Light, an ancient creature full of wisdom and kindness, whose duty is to protect the flame of life across different eras of history. Explore mysterious lands, solve clever puzzles, and master magical abilities as you engage in an epic battle against the Darkness.
3117730.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
